subtype_biology_note: HER2-enriched-like biology. Confirm HER2 by IHC/FISH; if clinically HER2-positive, discuss anti-HER2 therapy options.
doctor_support_recommendations: Confirm HER2 with pathology/IHC/FISH; discuss anti-HER2 regimen if clinically positive. | Treat as possible triple-negative/basal-like case until confirmed; discuss chemotherapy, immunotherapy eligibility, and BRCA testing. | High predicted recurrence risk: discuss adjuvant escalation, closer follow-up, and clinical trial eligibility. | High predicted survival-event risk: review stage, nodes, comorbidities, and multidisciplinary treatment intensity. | Node-positive disease: verify nodal stage and discuss systemic therapy/radiotherapy implications. | Grade 3 tumor: consider this a high-risk clinical feature in treatment planning. | Large tumor size: review local control plan and neoadjuvant/adjuvant strategy.

subtype_biology_note: Luminal B-like biology. Often higher proliferation than LumA; discuss endocrine therapy and whether chemotherapy escalation is justified by stage/risk.
doctor_support_recommendations: Discuss endocrine therapy suitability; check menopausal status and contraindications. | Confirm HER2 with pathology/IHC/FISH; discuss anti-HER2 regimen if clinically positive. | High predicted recurrence risk: discuss adjuvant escalation, closer follow-up, and clinical trial eligibility. | High predicted survival-event risk: review stage, nodes, comorbidities, and multidisciplinary treatment intensity. | Node-positive disease: verify nodal stage and discuss systemic therapy/radiotherapy implications. | Grade 3 tumor: consider this a high-risk clinical feature in treatment planning.

subtype_biology_note: Luminal A-like biology. Usually hormone-receptor driven; discuss endocrine therapy and genomic-risk guided chemotherapy decision where appropriate.
doctor_support_recommendations: Discuss endocrine therapy suitability; check menopausal status and contraindications.
